class.name: GazeServer
class.brief_description: Singleton coordinating display profiles, camera models, and thread-safe pipeline execution.
class.description: GazeServer is the core architectural component of godot-gaze. It manages spatial entities (Displays, Cameras, Faces, Eye Trackers) using RIDs, executes processor pipelines on a background thread, applies calibration, projects gaze rays onto displays, and defer-emits signals to Godot clients.

method.name: display_create
method.description: Create a display resource representation and return its unique RID.

method.name: display_set_geometry
method.description:
Set display size geometry parameter tokens.
p_display The display RID. p_logical_size Size of the screen in logical pixels. p_physical_size Physical width and height of the display in millimeters.
The display RID.
Size of the screen in logical pixels.
Physical width and height of the display in millimeters.

method.name: display_set_device_calibration
method.description: Set the active device calibration resource.

method.name: display_set_bio_calibration
method.description: Set the active biological calibration resource.

method.name: display_set_window_parameters
method.description:
Set window location and viewport transformation tokens.
p_display The display RID. p_window_pos Position of the window relative to primary screen top-left. p_viewport_transform Viewport scale and shift parameters.
The display RID.
Position of the window relative to primary screen top-left.
Viewport scale and shift parameters.

method.name: display_free
method.description: Free the display resource.

method.name: camera_create
method.description: Create a spatial camera model resource relative to a display.

method.name: camera_set_offsets
method.description:
Set camera offset translation and tilt angle relative to display center-top.
p_camera The camera RID. p_offset Offset position in millimeters. p_tilt Tilt angle in degrees (positive tilts down).
The camera RID.
Offset position in millimeters.
Tilt angle in degrees (positive tilts down).

method.name: camera_set_vision_rid
method.description: Associate the camera model with a raw VisionServer camera capture stream.

method.name: camera_free
method.description: Free the camera model resource.

method.name: face_tracker_create
method.description: Create a face tracker resource relative to a camera.

method.name: face_tracker_set_pose
method.description:
Set the current estimated head pose and detection status.
p_face The face RID. p_translation Head translation vector in Camera Space (mm). p_rotation Head rodrigues rotation vector in Camera Space. p_detected True if face landmarking succeeded.
The face RID.
Head translation vector in Camera Space (mm).
Head rodrigues rotation vector in Camera Space.
True if face landmarking succeeded.

method.name: face_tracker_free
method.description: Free the face tracker resource.

method.name: get_head_rotation_from_face_tracker
method.description: Retrieve head pose parameters in standard camera space.

method.name: eye_tracker_create
method.description: Create an eye tracker resource relative to a face.

method.name: eye_tracker_set_gaze
method.description:
Feed raw estimated gaze parameters in Camera Space and calculate screen intersections.
p_eye The eye RID. p_origin_cam Gaze origin 3D vector in Camera Space (mm). p_direction_cam Gaze direction 3D unit vector in Camera Space.
The eye RID.
Gaze origin 3D vector in Camera Space (mm).
Gaze direction 3D unit vector in Camera Space.

method.name: eye_tracker_set_smoother
method.description: Set a coordinate smoothing filter resource.

method.name: tracker_get_eye_crops
method.description: Retrieve eye crop images (left, right) for native UI display previews.

method.name: eye_tracker_free
method.description: Free the eye tracker resource.

method.name: get_gaze_origin_from_eye_tracker
method.description: Retrieve gaze origin and direction from eye tracker.

method.name: set_crops_on_eye_tracker
method.description: Set eye crop preview images.

method.name: reset_eye_tracker
method.description: Reset eye tracker coordinates and signal.

method.name: emit_camera_frame_ready
method.description: Emit gaze_data_ready for the VisionServer Camera RID.

method.name: get_relative_transform
method.description: Retrieve the relative spatial Transform3D for display, camera, face, or eye.

method.name: get_gaze_screen
method.description:
Get the latest calculated gaze coordinate on the display in logical pixels.
p_display The display RID. p_smoothed True to apply 1 Euro smoothing, false to return raw projection.
The display RID.
True to apply 1 Euro smoothing, false to return raw projection.

method.name: is_face_detected
method.description: Query whether a face is actively detected on the tracker.

method.name: set_pipeline_config
method.description: Update the server's pipeline configuration.

method.name: trigger_process
method.description: Trigger processing of any pending frames on the main thread (poll results).

method.name: start_processing
method.description: Start the background execution pipeline.

method.name: stop_processing
method.description: Stop the background execution pipeline.

method.name: get_singleton
method.description: Get the GazeServer global singleton instance.
